headline: Eaton Corporation to Merge Mobility Business with Dana
summary: Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) is included among the 13 Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in 2026. Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) is a power management company doing business in more than 160 countries. Its energy-efficient products and services help with effectively managing electrical, hydraulic, and mechanical power more reliably, efficiently, safely, and sustainably. Eaton Corporation […]

headline: TD SYNNEX Appoints Douglas Britt to Board of Directors
summary: FREMONT, Calif. & CLEARWATER, Fla., June 22, 2026--TD SYNNEX (NYSE:SNX) today announced the appointment of Douglas Britt to its Board of Directors (the "Board"), effective June 17, 2026, increasing the size of the Board from ten to eleven members. Britt will serve on the Board’s Audit Committee and Technology Committee.

headline: GE Vernova Stock Raised The Bar, Now It Has To Prove It
summary: Management is pointing to a future with billions more in cash flow, but the stock price suggests investors are still waiting for a reason to believe.
